detail.description:
[Login Rewards] 777 draws, an exclusive Duck Soldier outfit, a Gatling gun, and 100,000 Banknotes!

Ducks vs. Zombies — fight your way through the apocalypse! 
An easy-to-play Roguelike shooter combined with thrilling tower defense survival gameplay!  

- Build by Day, Defend by Night!
Daytime: Use your resources to upgrade your base, recruit soldiers, and deploy powerful defenses like Machine Gun Towers and EMP Towers to prepare for battle!  
Nighttime: Nearly a hundred mutated zombies and gian
detail.releaseNotes:
1. Added new levels and gameplay content for fresh challenges!
2. Optimized early combat experience and level difficulty pacing.
3. Fixed known issues and improved overall game performance and stability.
